hooks.command: command -v bridge-mcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'Bridge MCP ready. Use /bridge-mcp:bridge to manage remote hosts, or /bridge-mcp:discover to explore 357 tools.' || echo '⚠️  Bridge MCP plugin loaded, but the bridge-mcp binary was not found on PATH. Install it: cargo install --git https://github.com/muchini/bridge-mcp --features full'
